about.title: 20 Years of Gelato Excellence
about.subtitle: From a precision engineering workshop to a globally recognized gelato machine manufacturer.
about.story_p1: Founded in 2006, BEJADY started as a small precision parts workshop in Guangzhou, China. Our founder, a mechanical engineer with a passion for Italian gelato, saw an opportunity: bridge the gap between European gelato quality and accessible manufacturing.
about.story_p2: Over two decades, we've grown into a 15,000㎡ facility housing R&D, production, quality control, and a dedicated gelato lab. Every machine is built, tested, and perfected under one roof.
about.value_1_desc: CNC-machined components, rigorous tolerances, every part traceable.
about.value_2_desc: Authentic gelato technology adapted for global reliability and efficiency.
about.value_3_desc: We grow with our OEM partners — from recipe to packaging, we deliver.

oem.title: OEM & ODM Services
oem.subtitle: Your Brand, Our Expertise — End-to-End Gelato Machine Manufacturing
oem.why_1_desc: Two decades of continuous improvement in design, materials, and production processes.
oem.why_2_desc: Branding, color, voltage, compressor brand, control system — tailored to your market.
oem.why_3_desc: CE, UL, RoHS, FDA-compliant materials. Ready for Europe, Americas, Middle East, and Asia.
oem.why_4_desc: From product design and prototyping to mass production, logistics, and after-sales.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about BEJADY gelato machines and OEM partnerships.
faq.q1: What is the minimum order quantity (MOQ) for OEM orders?
faq.a1: Our MOQ for OEM orders is typically 10 units per model. For first-time partners, we offer a trial order of 3-5 units at a preferential rate.
faq.q2: What certifications do your machines have?
faq.a2: Our machines are CE certified for the European market, with UL options available for North America. All food-contact parts use FDA-compliant materials. RoHS and REACH compliance are standard.
faq.q3: Can you customize the machine design and branding?
faq.a3: Absolutely. We offer full customization including brand logo, color scheme, control panel layout, voltage/frequency configuration, and packaging design. Your brand, your specifications.
faq.q4: What is the typical lead time?
faq.a4: Standard lead time is 25-35 days after order confirmation and deposit. OEM orders with custom branding typically require 35-45 days. We also offer express delivery for urgent orders.
faq.q5: Do you provide after-sales support and spare parts?
faq.a5: Yes. We maintain a comprehensive spare parts inventory and offer technical support via video call, remote diagnostics, and on-site service in select regions. All machines come with a 12-month warranty.
faq.q6: What type of gelato can I make with your machines?
faq.a6: Our machines can produce a wide range of frozen desserts: Italian gelato, sorbet, sherbet, frozen yogurt, and soft serve. We also provide formulation support and recipe development for OEM partners.
faq.q7: Do you offer training and recipe support?
faq.a7: Yes, we provide comprehensive training including machine operation, maintenance, and gelato-making techniques. For OEM partners, we offer dedicated recipe development and formulation support.
faq.q8: What compressor brands do you use?
faq.a8: We partner with world-leading compressor manufacturers including Copeland, Bitzer, and Panasonic, ensuring reliable performance and efficient cooling across all operating conditions.
